languages.text: "Скоро. Я уже {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}начал экстракцию{/d}. Феномен сопротивляется, однако его силы — ничто передо мной".

traits.locale_text: "Скоро. Я уже начал экстракцию. Феномен сопротивляется, однако его силы — ничто передо мной".

languages.text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."
languages.original_text: "Скоро. Я уже {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}начал экстракцию{/d}. Феномен сопротивляется, однако его силы — ничто передо мной".

languages.text: "Bald. Ich habe bereits {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}mit der Extraktion begonnen{/d}. Das Phänomen widersetzt sich, aber seine Macht ist nichts im Vergleich zu meiner."
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."

traits.locale_text: "Bald. Ich habe bereits {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}mit der Extraktion begonnen{/d}. Das Phänomen widersetzt sich, aber seine Macht ist nichts im Vergleich zu meiner."

languages.text: “快了。我已经{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}开始提取{/d}了。这个现象在抵抗，但它的力量在我面前根本不值一提。”
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."

traits.locale_text: “快了。我已经{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}开始提取{/d}了。这个现象在抵抗，但它的力量在我面前根本不值一提。”

languages.text: « Patience. J'ai déjà {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}commencé le processus d'extraction{/d}. Le phénomène me résiste, mais son pouvoir n'est rien face au mien. »
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."

traits.locale_text: « Patience. J'ai déjà {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}commencé le processus d'extraction{/d}. Le phénomène me résiste, mais son pouvoir n'est rien face au mien. »

languages.text: «Acabaré pronto. Ya he {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}comenzado la extracción{/d}. El fenómeno opone resistencia, pero su poder no es nada comparado con el mío».
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."

traits.locale_text: «Acabaré pronto. Ya he {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}comenzado la extracción{/d}. El fenómeno opone resistencia, pero su poder no es nada comparado con el mío».

languages.text: "Yakında. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}Çıkarma işlemine çoktan başladım{/d}. Fenomen direniyor ama gücü benimkinin yanında bir hiç."
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."

traits.locale_text: "Yakında. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}Çıkarma işlemine çoktan başladım{/d}. Fenomen direniyor ama gücü benimkinin yanında bir hiç."

languages.text: 「もうすぐだ。すでに{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}抽出を開始している{/d}。現象は抵抗するが、その力は私の力に比べれば取るに足らない」
languages.original_text: "Soon. I have already {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealNomos}begun the extraction{/d}. The phenomenon resists, yet its power is as nothing compared to mine."
